item.title: Abduction of Mexican mine workers raises doubts over touted security improvements
item.description: The abduction of 10 mine workers in Mexico's Sinaloa state has raised questions again about the government's touted security improvements

item.title: Presidents Day 2026: Here's what's open and closed on the holiday
item.description: Government offices, the stock market and schools are closed Monday in observance of Presidents Day, but most big retailers are open

item.title: China grants UK and Canada visa-free entry, raising total to 79 countries
item.description: China is letting British and Canadian citizens enter without a visa as it tries to boost tourism and business

item.title: Flights are delayed as workers strike at Kenya's main airport
item.description: Flights at Kenya’s main airport are being delayed as workers launched a planned strike over a labor dispute with authorities

item.title: India hosts a high-stakes AI summit, drawing 20 leaders and top tech CEOs
item.description: India is hosting a major AI summit in New Delhi this week, as it pushes to shape global rules and show its own AI ambitions
